/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 08-01-22(60)/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED/X:THE COURT FINDS BYCLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM,/NB/SAORD/SA1: MASHAL AMIRI, DOB 11-02-97/SA1: ASIYA B,DOB 12-18-20/SA1: UNBORN CHILD B, DUE 06-18-22/SA2: 51 ASHBURY TERRACE, SANFRANCISCO, CA 94117/SAORD3/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT 20/DOP/TE: 4 HOURS/
